channel.title: C# on Himalaya's Dev Journal
channel.description: Recent content in C# on Himalaya's Dev Journal

item.title: Post-Mortem: Game Jam Entry
item.description: What went right, what went wrong, and what I’d do differently at my first game jam.

item.title: Game Jam 2025 Entry
item.description: A 48-hour game jam entry — a gravity-flipping puzzle game. Didn’t place but had a blast building it.
